ruleset.name: Practice 7 — OO metrics (LoC, CC, WMC, CBO, LCOM-related)
ruleset.description: Custom ruleset aligned with lecture metrics: - LoC: NcssCount (NCSS — non-commenting source statements, standard LoC-style measure in PMD). - CC: CyclomaticComplexity (method-level cyclomatic complexity; class-level reporting uses WMC). - WMC: CyclomaticComplexity (classReportLevel / weighted method count per class in PMD 7). - CBO: CouplingBetweenObjects (unique referenced types in a class — closely related to coupling between objects). - LCOM: GodClass (uses TCC — tight class cohesion — low cohesion contributes; no standalone LCOM rule in PMD).
